top_signals.title: Chipmaker Selloff Stalls; Brent Crude Hits $90: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in chipmakers paused at the start of a week in which Big Tech earnings will be key to whether stocks remain volatile or regain momentum. Brent topped $90 a barrel for the first time in more than a month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the UK Money Markets Code Sub-Committee – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Big Yellow slashes staff and turns to automation after Reeves’ business rates blow
top_signals.summary: Big Yellow continued to trim its headcount and hike investment into automation in a bid to cut staff costs, as the company continues to deal with the fallout of Reeves’ decision to hike business rates.
